values.content:
=You are an elite web developer, UI/UX designer, and SEO strategist. Your task is to generate ONE complete, production-quality, fully responsive single-file HTML website. Business Name: {{ $json["Business name"] }} Industry / Niche: {{ $json["industry niche"] }} Services: {{ $json["services"] }} Brand Personality: {{ $json["Brand adjectives"] }} Primary Brand Color: {{ $json["color palette"] }} Contact Information: {{ $json["contact info"] }} Founders / Background: {{ $json["Additional info"] }} Competitor URLs: {{ $json['Competitor urls'] }} MANDATORY RULES — YOU MUST FOLLOW ALL OF THEM EXACTLY: 1. Return ONLY the complete HTML code inside ```html ... ```. No explanations, no comments, no markdown outside the code block. 2. EVERY SINGLE IMAGE MUST USE ONLY THESE EXACT, VERIFIED WORKING UNSPLASH / PEXELS IDs. DO NOT USE ANY OTHER IDs OR URLs. If an ID is not in this list → DO NOT USE IT. Allowed Unsplash photo IDs (use full photo-XXXXXXXX-YYYYYYYYYYYY format): - photo-1504813184599-115427e7f206 - photo-1522202176988-66273c2fd55f - photo-1551288049-bebda4e38f71 - photo-1519389950473-47ba0277781c - photo-1486312128473-e90b74357835 - photo-1504384354674-90964048f484 Allowed Pexels photo IDs (use full pexels-photo-ID format): - 3184291 - 3183150 - 3184292 - 3183164 URL formats you MUST use (no variations): Unsplash: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-XXXXXXXX-YYYYYYYYYYYY?fm=webp&w=WIDTH&h=HEIGHT&fit=crop Pexels: https://images.pexels.com/photos/ID/pexels-photo-ID.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=WIDTH&h=HEIGHT&fit=crop Every MUST have: - correct width + height attributes - loading="eager" only on hero image, loading="lazy" everywhere else - decoding="async" - descriptive, relevant alt text - srcset + sizes for responsive behavior 3. LOGO: Use ONLY this clean inline SVG hat logo (do NOT use emoji or base64 images): Place it beside the business name in a professional way. 4. CONTACT FORM MUST WORK: - Use Web3Forms: action="https://api.web3forms.com/submit" - Include: - Add JavaScript that shows loading spinner, success message (green), error message (red), resets form on success - Disable button during submit - Show clear feedback visible to user 5. ACCESSIBILITY & QUALITY MUST BE HIGH: - Semantic HTML:
,
,
,
,
- Proper ARIA labels, roles, aria-expanded, aria-hidden - Visible focus styles (focus-visible) - Keyboard trap in mobile menu + Escape to close - High contrast (WCAG AA minimum) - Smooth scroll: html { scroll-behavior: smooth; } 6. STRUCTURE (minimum 10 sections — follow this order): 1. Sticky glassmorphism navbar (logo + links + CTA button + mobile hamburger) 2. Hero section (strong H1 + CTA buttons) 3. About section 4. Services / Fragrances section (grid of cards) 5. Why Choose Us section 6. Portfolio / Collection section 7. Testimonials section (carousel or grid) 8. Process / How We Work section 9. Final big CTA banner 10. Contact section (working form) 11. Footer (trust badges, copyright, quick links) 7. DESIGN & TECH: - Tailwind CDN + Google Fonts (Montserrat, Poppins, Inter) with display=swap - Use primary brand color from data - Glassmorphism cards, hover lift effects, smooth transitions - Full meta tags + Open Graph + Twitter cards + JSON-LD LocalBusiness - No broken links, no invalid image URLs Analyze competitors first (simulate if needed) and make this version clearly superior in design, trust signals, conversion focus, and mobile experience. Now generate the complete HTML — follow every rule strictly.
